content.text:
MARINER_REQUEST [mdm-a1b2c3d4]: Create full linkedin account and profile for Sarah Johnson.
Briefing: Set up Sarah Johnson LinkedIn profile fully

IMPORTANT — When you finish (whether success or failure), POST to this webhook:
  curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"type":"account_created","execution_id":"test-fresh-001","session_id":"mariner-mdm-a1b2c3d4-d208cd86","account_id":"mdm-a1b2c3d4","client_name":"Sarah Johnson","platform":"linkedin","status":"complete"}' 'https://wlowwprkjdhvfecsxsvp.supabase.co/functions/v1/mariner-webhook'

On failure:
  curl -s -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"type":"account_created","execution_id":"test-fresh-001","session_id":"mariner-mdm-a1b2c3d4-d208cd86","account_id":"mdm-a1b2c3d4","client_name":"Sarah Johnson","platform":"linkedin","status":"failed","error":"<actual error>"}' 'https://wlowwprkjdhvfecsxsvp.supabase.co/functions/v1/mariner-webhook'

This is an automated request from the Mariner backend. Handle fully autonomously.
clientId: mdm-a1b2c3d4
platform: linkedin
